title: angostura granulosa
intro: Angostura granulosa, also known as Angostura bark or Angostura tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Angostura granulosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in the region. Angostura granulosa is typically prepared for consumption in the form of herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used as an ingredient in various traditional medicinal preparations, such as the popular Angostura bitters.
